ligand_name.description: Ligand name as reported in the paper. Keep the reported alias string rather than inventing standardized names or IDs.

method.description: Experimental or computational method as reported in the paper. Prefer canonical method names when obvious from the source.

value.description: Raw reported endpoint value exactly as written in the paper, preserving endpoint labels, units, inequalities, and scientific notation.

sequence.description: Exact nucleotide sequence string when explicitly recoverable. If the paper gives only a sequence alias, set this field to null.

sequence_name.description: Sequence alias or context label used in the paper, such as c-MYC, hTel, or Pu24; PDB ID: 2MGN.
